name: White Snake Princess Hime
description: A type of lamia that is quite rare, found mostly in 'royal bloodlines'. They’re a monster that’s distinguished by having white skin with little pigment, white hair, and the lower body of a white snake. This one was found at a young age and seen as a goddess by a human village who put her in a temple where she rules, her name is Hime.
creator: Cherry_Kitsune
